## Checklist

- [ ] `gofmt` clean and `go vet ./...` passes
- [ ] `go test ./...` passes
- [ ] If protos changed, `buf generate proto` was run and the result committed
- [ ] Docs updated (if user-facing behavior changed)
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `## [Unreleased]`
